title: quercus nivea
intro: Quercus nivea, also known as the Himalayan white oak, is a deciduous tree species native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Quercus nivea include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Quercus nivea can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
